node.text: Stay on top of your move
Turn on notifications to get reminders for bills, tasks, and key move dates before they slip by.

You're planning a move to Colorado in the next one to three months, and you'll need to handle some important paperwork—including updating your address with the post office, registering your vehicle with Colorado's DMV, and setting up electric service at your new rental. Since you have pets and need storage, you'll want to research pet policies at your new place and lock in storage early, and you should also plan time to sort out your tax filing address and any ID updates before you go.
It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.
It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.
It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.
